name: Sloppy Al's Tofu (Just for You, Al)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Regular tofu, frozen, thawed and squeezed
2 medium Green peppers, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the tofu and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the onion and peppers in 3 tablespoons of oil until just tender.
3. Add the tomato sauce, chili powder, salt, pepper, oregano, soy sauce, mustard, and sugar to the skillet. Stir and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
4. Heat the remaining 3 tablespoons of oil in a heavy skillet. Add the tofu and Worcestershire sauce. Stir until the tofu is nicely browned and the Worcestershire sauce is absorbed.
5. Add the tomato sauce mixture and simmer another 5 minutes.
6. Serve over sandwich buns with plenty of green salad. Enjoy!
